name: claude-fusion-companion
description: Codex companion for inspecting and explaining the Claude Fusion plugin package.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Claude Fusion installation and usage from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A thin Codex companion for the Claude Fusion plugin package. It does not replace the Claude Code /fusion and /fusion-debug skills; it helps Codex explain the package boundary, inspect local installation state, and point users to the correct Claude-side commands.
